channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Strategy bought time but Bitcoin’s next cycle may need buyers beyond Saylor
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy has calmed the immediate panic around its preferred-stock complex, but the company’s latest overhaul points to a more complicated phase for one of Bitcoin’s most visible corp...
item.dc:creator: CryptoSlate

item.title: NetNut proxy network disrupted, 2 million infected devices cut off
item.description: A joint operation involving Google has disrupted NetNut, a residential proxy network that gave access to millions of compromised Android devices, including smart TVs and streaming boxes. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Bitcoin Recovers Toward $62K as ETF Inflows Return and Trump’s BTC Holdings Make Waves: Weekly Crypto Update
item.description: Bitcoin bounced from $58,000 toward $62,000 this week, while altcoins recovered and ETF inflows returned....
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.title: The fight over the UK’s digital pound has become a battle over crypto’s political influence

item.title: Bitcoin Recovery Hinges on Breakout Above $72K Resistance (BTC Price Analysis)
item.description: Bitcoin is attempting to build a short-term recovery after weeks of sustained selling pressure. Although buyers have defended a key support zone, the broader trend remains fragile as price continues t...
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.title: North Korea-Linked npm Packages Mimic Rollup Polyfills to Steal Developer Secrets
item.description:
Threat actors with ties to North Korea have been linked to a fresh set of malicious npm packages that masquerade as Rollup polyfill tooling to facilitate remote access and data theft.
According to JF...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs see biggest inflow since May after weak US jobs report sparks BTC price rebound

item.title: Armored Likho Targets Government Agencies, Power Sector with BusySnake Stealer
item.description:

"...

item.title: Bitcoin rally hinges on whether the Fed buys into the weak jobs report after bad miss

item.title: Adobe Patches 7 CVSS 10.0 Flaws in ColdFusion and Campaign Classic
